scripts.vercel:build: if [ -f "$HOME/.cargo/env" ]; then . "$HOME/.cargo/env"; fi; npm run build
scripts.vercel:install: if ! command -v rustup >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal --default-toolchain none; fi; if [ -f "$HOME/.cargo/env" ]; then . "$HOME/.cargo/env"; fi; rustup toolchain install; cargo install trunk --version 0.21.14 --locked
